breakfast: Ham, Cheddar & Chive Omelette — home fries; shaved carrot–apple salad (lemon + Dijon).
Egg & Cheese English Muffins — bacon; fruit cup.
Pasta Fagioli Soup (lunch) — crusty bread; warm broccoli rabe or broccoli salad (garlic + lemon + chili flakes).
Chicken Parm Hero (brunch) — Italian chopped salad (romaine, pepperoncini, olives, provolone, red-wine vinaigrette); chips.
Chicken Salad Sandwich — grapes; crunchy veg sticks; chips.
Breakfast Fried Rice (Southern) (rice, eggs, ham) — cucumber salad; hot sauce.
dinner: Coq au Vin Blanc — Chicken braised with white wine, mushrooms, and pearl onions; buttered egg noodles; citrus fruit cup.
Beef Bourguignon — Red-wine beef stew with carrots and mushrooms; parsley potatoes; roasted Brussels sprouts.
Chicken Pot Pie (skillet) — Creamy chicken and winter veg under puff pastry; shaved carrot salad; lemony peas.
Spaghetti And Meatballs - side salad, garlic bread
Albóndigas Soup (meatball soup) — Beef meatballs in tomato broth; rice; side salad.
Chili Con Carne — Beef chili; hotdogs; cheddar.
Gumbo-Style Chicken & Sausage Stew — rice; potato salad; scallions.

breakfast: Chicken Sausage Sweet-Potato Hash — sunny egg; sautéed spinach; orange wedges.
Eggs Benedict (bacon) — crispy potatoes; fruit cup.
Cobb Lunch Plate — grilled chicken, egg, bacon, avocado; roll.
Classic Minestrone — tomato base, beans, carrots, celery, zucchini, small pasta; garlic bread, romaine Caesar.
Potato-Leek Soup — ham-and-Gruyère toastie; endive–walnut salad (Dijon vinaigrette).
Chicken Velouté (cream of chicken) — parmesan toast soldiers; simple side salad
Bistro French Onion Soup — beef broth, thyme, sherry finish; Gruyère toast; croque monsieur halves, citrus fruit cup.
dinner: Lasagna — winter chopped salad (romaine + radicchio, red-wine vinaigrette); garlic bread.
Chicken & Root Veg Tray Roast — horseradish cream; buttered potatoes; cabbage slaw.
French Dip Sandwiches — Roast beef, au jus; oven fries; pickle spears
Beef Stroganoff — egg noodles; roasted broccoli.
Chicken & Sausage Jambalaya — roasted broccoli; simple tomato salad.
Herb-Roasted Pork Tenderloin — roasted cauliflower; roasted carrots; vinaigrette salad.
Chicken Noodle Soup (real broth) — Roasted chicken stock; buttered rolls; simple spinach salad.
